title: SKYMAX 2025 PRECISE M5 MENS COMPLETE GOLF SET - RIGHT HAND
features: Fairway Woods: Designed to be easy to hit
Stainless Steel Irons: Wide sole and offset
Regular Graphite Shafts in Driver / Fairway & Hybrid
Regular Steel Shafts in Irons – easy to hit lightweight
Putter: Mallet head with easy to align design
description: The Precise M5 Mens Golf Set is the perfect choice whether you’re a beginner, an avid golfer, or if you can only get out to the course a few times per year. The lightweight shafts and oversized clubheads are user-friendly and the off-set design allows the beginning to intermediate golfer to get the ball in the air easier. Not only will this set improve your game, but it looks great as well. Constructed from premium materials the Precise M5 includes everything that you will need to get out on the course.
